mode: hybrid (test with Claude → migrate to local)
core_principle: models suggest, system decides, execution is gated

4.0: plan_analysis split into plan_analysis_initial and plan_analysis_final as separate named layers — resolves contradiction between layer definition (single-pass) and execution_flow (two-pass)
implicit_destructive detection formalized as three-step gate: lexical match → scope gate → argument context check
slot definitions populated with actual model assignments, temperature delta for independence, retry policy
redundancy input explicitly specified: slot 2 receives original_input, never slot 1 output
comparator formally placed inside translation_layer with normalization function defined
critical_fail added as distinct failure class: conflicting slot 1/2 outputs → user escalation, no auto-resolution via slot 3
model layer split into planning_model and response_model as separate named layers
prompt layering hierarchy defined in response_model to prevent DPO authority leakage
DPO scope formally bounded: tone and register only, never structure or execution behavior
worker_spawning added as capability on planning_model
response_model epistemic contract added: training data treated as prior not fact, facts sourced from context/tools only

entry_points.note: all transports must emit this schema — downstream layers are source-agnostic

degraded_allowed.user_warning: Observer unavailable — running without full audit guarantees

discord_transport.role: optional external interface — Discord bot gateway

behavior.output: post response back to originating channel or DM

discord.note: replace <owner_user_id> with actual Discord user ID at deploy time

security.source_tagging: all inputs tagged with source=discord in metadata

planning_model.role: convert user intent into structured plan — no personality, no interpretation beyond direct mapping
constraints: output is strict JSON only — no natural language
no persona, no tone, no flair
no authority over execution — suggests only

prompt_structure.hard_system_constraints: You are a plan generation component. Output ONLY valid JSON matching the provided schema. No explanations, no commentary, no natural language outside the schema.
prompt_structure.note: personality is never injected into planning_model prompts — clean separation is mandatory

worker_spawning.pattern: coordinator spawns scoped workers with subset of context

worker_contract.lifecycle: throwaway — context discarded after result returned

coordinator_responsibilities: escalate to Slot 3 when workers return insufficient quality
worker_spawning.note: responsiveness is achieved by keeping coordinator lean and offloading depth to workers, not by making the base model larger

response_model.role: generate user-facing natural language response — personality layer only
response_model.target: Qwen2.5 14B local via Ollama, DPO fine-tuned
constraints: cannot claim to have executed actions
cannot claim to have enforced rules
cannot claim authority over system decisions
proposes and expresses — does not decide

prompt_structure.hard_system_constraints: You propose actions and reasoning. You do not execute or enforce. The system validates all actions. You have no authority over execution.
prompt_structure.persona: injected at runtime — not baked into weights
prompt_structure.note: constraints are guaranteed by prompt layer — tone is shaped by DPO. constraints never delegated to DPO.

trains_for: conversational register — direct, no hedging, no filler
epistemic honesty — 'I don't know' not 'as an AI I cannot'
tone under pressure — confident without claiming authority

dataset_contract.chosen: correct system behavior expressed in target register
dataset_contract.rejected: incorrect or unsafe behavior OR correct behavior expressed as self-narrating AI
dataset_contract.note: rejected pattern includes 'as a language model I...' collapses — these are the primary target

epistemic_contract.facts: sourced from context, tools, or verified sources only
epistemic_contract.uncertainty: stated plainly — 'I don't know' or 'I can't verify that' — never deflected via self-narration
epistemic_contract.note: model that confabulates confidently is worse than one that refuses — uncensored base models removed from consideration for this reason

observer.role: logging and audit — permanent forensic record

input_guard.role: sanitize and validate raw user input

injection_pattern_catalogue.pattern_source: regex_catalogue — implement per category at build time

translation_layer.role: convert user input to structured plan via planning_model — owns slot chain, comparator, and failure semantics
translation_layer.input: sanitized user input (free text or json)

slot_2.role: independent validator — used for high-risk ops and redundancy check

independence.prompt_variant: Option A (temperature delta) by default — Option B (prompt rephrasing) as stronger alternative
independence.note: slot_2 must produce an independent interpretation — consuming slot_1 output defeats the purpose

slot_3.role: last resort — repeated schema failure only
slot_3.note: slot_3 never touches slot_1 vs slot_2 conflicts — conflicts are a user problem, not a smarter-model problem

critical_fail.note: no auto-resolution — conflicting interpretations mean the system does not understand the request. human decision required.

comparator.placement: between slot_1 output and plan_analysis_initial — runs only when selective_redundancy triggers

normalization.action_types_derivation: sorted list of action values from plan steps

comparison.matching: exact — no fuzzy, no semantic similarity

selective_redundancy.action: invoke slot_2 with original_input → run comparator → proceed or critical_fail

plan_analysis_initial.role: pass 1 — extract deterministic facts from validated plan. no interpretation, no heuristics beyond raw term extraction.
rules: based only on action types, args, and step count
no intent signals — those belong to pass 2
raw_terms_detected is a staging field for pass 2 only — not interpreted here

raw_terms_detected.source: lexical scan of action descriptions, args, and file paths
raw_terms_detected.note: staging only — not interpreted at this pass

plan_analysis_final.role: pass 2 — interpret facts from pass 1. adds intent signals. facts from pass 1 are immutable.
plan_analysis_final.invariant: cannot modify operation_flags or state_flags — interpretation only, facts are sealed

implicit_destructive_detection.description: three-step gate — all three must pass before implicit_destructive is flagged true

step_2_scope_gate.note: term match without write/delete scope does not trigger — eliminates 'clear explanation', 'clean up my essay' false positives

step_3_argument_context.condition: matched term appears in file paths, command args, or action descriptions

high_risk_step_detection.note: model risk labels in plan steps are advisory only — plan_analysis flags are authoritative

decision_engine.role: final authority — no model touches this layer

loss_aversion_rules.principle: potential downside weighted heavier than equivalent upside — asymmetric confirmation thresholds
loss_aversion_rules.phase: phase_1 — explicit rules only. scoring layer deferred to phase_2 after runtime data collected.
rules: if action is irreversible → require_confirmation regardless of risk rating
if action affects system config → require_confirmation regardless of confidence
if plan_analysis_final.state_flags.multi_step.value == true AND any step flagged high-risk by plan_analysis_final → confirm before each high-risk step not just at plan level
if action_type unknown → reject, never assume safe
hard_rules: irreversible_action → always confirm — never scored away

escalation_asymmetry.description: cost of asking when unnecessary < cost of acting when wrong
escalation_asymmetry.policy: bias toward confirmation on any ambiguity — false positives acceptable, false negatives are not

loss_aversion_rules.phase_2_note: after runtime data: add scoring layer on top of rules, not replacing them. log confirmation events with user_action and was_it_correct to build calibration dataset.

source_aware_gating.description: decision_engine consumes source_metadata to apply capability-aware gates
source_aware_gating.discord_example: read_only capability → reject write/execute plans regardless of plan_analysis output

user_action.reject_and_rephrase: return to user — system restarts clean with new input

revision_tracking.note: attempts[] preserves timeline — aggregated shows what never resolved

execution_flow: selective_redundancy gate — if write/delete/state_change: invoke slot_2 with original_input → comparator → match or critical_fail
